properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 172/23
 EFFECTIVE ON JANUARY 1ST 2024, THE ARCTIC NAV-AND METAREAS WILL CHANGE HOW THEY ADRESS THEIR BORADCASTS OF WARNINGS AND FORCASTS. THIS MAY AFFECT VESSELS WITH OLDER INMARSAT-C AND MINI-C RECEIVERS

 VESSELS NOT RECIVING ARCTIC NAV-AND METAREA WARNINGS AND FORCASTS AFTER JANUARY 1ST ARE ENCOURAGED TO CONTACT THEIR EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURER

 FOR MORE INFORMATION AND SUPPORT NAVAREA XIX CAN BE CONTACTED AT NAVAREA19@KYSTVERKET.NO OR AT +4778943000
